description: Spatial anchors separated by landmark class so visual indicators are not treated as core engineering datums.

landmarks.human_description: Top outer rear corner of the left-hand C-channel frame rail.
landmarks.surface_definition: Point intersection of the vertical outer web, top flange, and rear cut edge

landmarks.human_description: Center of the front left outer wheel hub cover center ornament.
landmarks.surface_definition: Center of the embossed logo on the removable plastic/metal center cap
landmarks.repeatability_basis: Dependent on the fitment of the removable trim cap

landmarks.human_description: Centerpoint of the front axle face at the lateral centerline (theoretical).
landmarks.surface_definition: Geometric center of the axle beam face / spindle axis plane intersection
landmarks.repeatability_basis: Design geometry after verified SRC page evidence + physical confirmation
